title: Consolidate duplicate _buildComfyViewUrl/_collectComfyOutputUrls (comfyController vs commandExecutor)
description: REFACTOR (from 2026-07-02 complexity audit; ~1h, low risk). Same algorithm implemented twice with diverged calling conventions: js/services/comfyController.js:62-88 (takes httpBase param, used by _reconcileFromHistory) vs js/services/commandExecutor.js:37-64 (takes forceLocal, derives httpBase via getEngine). When ComfyUI output shape changes (already happened when `videos` joined `gifs`) both copies must be found and updated. FIX: one function in js/utils/comfyOutputUrls.js with the controller signature (httpBase, nodeOutput, target); executor keeps a 2-line forceLocal adapter. Verify: local gen + remote gen both produce working media URLs; history reconcile still resolves outputs. BRANCH: RunPod.
